name: Local L2R TCP Scanner
notes: Reports a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common TCP ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Database Ports, BB:PortDefinition: DHCP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: DNS Ports, BB:PortDefinition: FTP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Game Server Ports, BB:PortDefinition: IM Ports, BB:PortDefinition: IRC Ports, BB:PortDefinition: LDAP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Mail Ports, BB:PortDefinition: P2P Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Proxy Ports, BB:PortDefinition: RPC Ports, BB:PortDefinition: SNMP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: SSH Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Web Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Windows Ports
when the context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
when the IP protocol is one of the following TCP.tcp_ip
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Local L2R TCP Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND NOT when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Database Ports, BB:PortDefinition: DHCP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: DNS Ports, BB:PortDefinition: FTP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Game Server Ports, BB:PortDefinition: IM Ports, BB:PortDefinition: IRC Ports, BB:PortDefinition: LDAP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Mail Ports, BB:PortDefinition: P2P Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Proxy Ports, BB:PortDefinition: RPC Ports, BB:PortDefinition: SNMP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: SSH Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Web Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Windows Ports
AND when the context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following TCP.tcp_ip
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Local TCP Scanner Detected
Event description: Detected  a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common TCP ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
